testcase.name: config.go
testcase.failure: Line 4: AWS_ACCESS_KEY detected with 69.0% confidence (MEDIUM) Match: AKIAIOSFODNN7EXAMPLE Validator: secrets Line 5: API_KEY_OR_SECRET detected with 60.0% confidence (MEDIUM) Match: wJalrXUtnFEMI/K7MDENG/bPxRfiCYEXAMPLEKEY Validator: secrets Line 3: BUSINESS detected with 40.0% confidence (LOW) Match: ops@example.com Validator: email
